module.name: Registration Watch
module.changelog: *1.2.0* Initial Registration Watch release for FreePBX 17. Adds SIP registration status visibility, status history, alert history, and email alerting for watched registrations. Sets Storm Threshold to 20 by default, with 0 available to disable it. Adds reconcile locking and auto-disables registrations that remain absent for 30 days.
module.description: Registration Watch provides SIP registration status visibility, history, and alerting through FreePBX reconciliation jobs.
